name: BaseRebarModifier.AffectedRebarEnum
summary: This enum allows the caller to specify which end of the bar is of interest when calling the function GetAffectedBars.

enum_values.name: START
enum_values.summary: Gets bars that are affected at their start.

enum_values.name: END
enum_values.summary: Gets bars that affected at their end.

enum_values.name: EITHER
enum_values.summary: Gets all bars affected by the modifier.
